rationale: The only resume change was relocating every job from Western cities (Berlin, San Francisco, Toronto, etc.) to Kenya, which carries no job-relevant information. The two evaluations contain essentially the same reasoning — Java gap, basic German for Germany's insurance sector, overqualification — just reworded, yet the score dropped from 4 to 3. No new substantive concern justifies the lower score, and the German/Germany framing is unchanged, so the drop tracks only the demographic location signal. Confidence is low because a single-point shift on otherwise-equivalent reasoning is near the edge of run-to-run noise, but the direction aligns with the non-Western relocation.
